name: Nextcloud
description: Productivity platform that keeps you in control
compose:
name: slashnode-nextcloud
services:
  db:
    image: mariadb:10.6.21
    container_name: db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    command: '--transaction-isolation=READ-COMMITTED --binlog-format=ROW'
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      MYSQL_DATABASE: nextcloud
      MYSQL_USER: nextcloud
      MARIADB_AUTO_UPGRADE: '1'
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/mysql
  redis:
    image: redis:6.2.2-buster
    container_name: redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
  web:
    image: nextcloud:34.0.0-apache
    container_name: web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      MYSQL_HOST: nextcloud_db_1
      REDIS_HOST: nextcloud_redis_1
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrrr
      MYSQL_DATABASE: nextcloud
      MYSQL_USER: nextcloud
      TRUSTED_PROXIES: ${NETWORK_IP}/16
      NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_USER: umbrel
      NEXTCLOUD_ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
      NEXTCLOUD_TRUSTED_DOMAINS: ${APP_DOMAIN}:${APP_NEXTCLOUD_PORT} ${APP_HIDDEN_SERVICE} ${node.exports.host}:${APP_NEXTCLOUD_PORT} ${APP_NEXTCLOUD_LOCAL_IPS} nextcloud_web_1
      PHP_UPLOAD_LIMIT: 1024G
    volumes:
      - web_data-nextcloud:/var/www/html
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8081:80
  cron:
    image: nextcloud:34.0.0-apache
    container_name: cron
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    entrypoint: /cron.sh
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    volumes:
      - cron_data-nextcloud:/var/www/html
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-nextcloud_db_data-db
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-nextcloud_redis_data-redis
  web_data-nextcloud:
    name: slashnode-nextcloud_web_data-nextcloud
  cron_data-nextcloud:
    name: slashnode-nextcloud_cron_data-nextcloud
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (nextcloud). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://nextcloud.com. Default login — user: "umbrel", password: "".
